name: cpig-repmatrix-mesh-auto
description: D7 rep-matrix cell (mesh x auto), R1.3 2026-07-03. Creates a DENSE mesh-derived field (_CPigFromMesh of a MeshSphere r=10; voxel-bakes on export), applies the deterministic solo-perspective camera recipe (decoy-sphere framing, cloned from cpig-booleans), then no rep change ('auto' is the fresh-field default), gates on steady+bakes-drained, captures. mode:capture until the operator approves baselines (STOP-POINT R1.3), then flips to pixel-diff. Degrade-by-design cells (dense field asked as tape -> companion stand-in) are kept deliberately: the documented fallback is the behavior to lock. Regenerate: scripts/gen_rep_matrix_tests.py.

setup.vlmDescription: a smooth ray-marched SDF ball derived from a mesh sphere, drawn as a solid surface (the default representation). NOT an empty grey viewport.

checkpoints.name: cpig-repmatrix-mesh-auto
checkpoints.description: mesh field rendered with the 'auto' per-field representation.
